steps.text: Confirm scope, parties, and key economic terms to be amended (base rent only; all other lease terms unchanged). Identify missing deal points to mark as [TBD].
Draft core amendment structure: title, recitals tying back to the original lease (and any prior amendments), and defined terms.
Draft the rent modification provision: specify the new monthly base rent, effective date, and any schedule; clarify that all other rent components remain unchanged.
Draft ratification and no‑other‑changes clauses reaffirming the base lease and addressing conflicts between documents.
Add boilerplate: counterparts/e-signatures, authority, governing law (if needed), and attorney‑review / no‑legal‑advice disclaimer.
Quality check against pipeline checklist (placeholders [TBD] for any missing facts) and prepare final clean amendment text.
